registry.title: Inspections registry
registry.subtitle: Inspection tracking and team validation.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by target or template code...

empty.title: No inspection yet
empty.subtitle: Schedule your first inspection from an existing template or create one.

registry.loadError: Registry could not load. Check your access rights or try again.

ai.methodHint: Choose how you want to work. AI assistance is a helper: you keep control over every finding.
ai.methodAiDesc: Photograph the equipment: the AI proposes findings that you validate.
ai.panelSubtitle: Photograph a part of the target: the AI checks it against the checkpoints and proposes findings.
ai.demoBanner: Demo mode: the Anthropic API key is not configured. The AI will return a simulated analysis to test the workflow. Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to Backend/.env to enable real analysis.
ai.zonePlaceholder: E.g.: front left tire of {{target}}, cabin extinguisher…
ai.analyzeError: AI analysis failed. Try again or continue with manual entry.
ai.irrelevant: The photo does not seem to match the inspected target.
ai.noProposals: No checkpoint can be assessed from this photo. Photograph another part of the target.
ai.disclaimer: The AI proposes, the inspector decides: verify every finding before saving. Applied values remain editable and conformity is recalculated by the platform.
ai.overrideReason: Finding proposed by AI assistance, validated by the inspector
ai.summaryAttribution: — Summary produced with AI assistance, verified and validated by the inspector.
ai.reviewSubtitle: Advisory critical review: completeness, consistency, risks and improvement leads.
ai.reviewLoadingHint: The AI is reviewing the findings and the report summary…
ai.reviewIdle: Run the analysis to get a quality assessment of the report and improvement suggestions.
ai.reviewError: Report review failed. Try again later.
ai.reviewDisclaimer: AI-generated advisory analysis: it replaces neither the inspector's judgment nor the team's collegial validation.

execute.photoHint: Server upload will be available after use case validation. Record the photo reference here if needed.
execute.summaryHint: Summarize key findings and the overall recommendation. This text becomes part of the final report.
execute.summaryPlaceholder: After full inspection, the equipment remains fit for service provided...
execute.footerSubmitDisabled: Fill all required checkpoints to submit
execute.readonlyBanner: This inspection is archived. Values are read-only.
execute.rejectedBanner: This inspection was rejected by the team. Fix the findings and resubmit.

schedule.title: Schedule an inspection
schedule.subtitle: Pick the target, the template to apply, then the execution date.
